name: MegaMem Pro
description: Connects to remote MegaMem MCP servers over StreamableHTTP/SSE via Tailscale. Servers are auto-discovered from MEGAMEM_<NAME>_URL + MEGAMEM_<NAME>_TOKEN env vars, or declared explicitly in plugin config.

servers.description: Optional explicit server declarations. Keys are server names. Overrides env discovery for matching names.

token.description: Bearer token (prefer tokenEnv to avoid storing secrets in config)

tokenEnv.description: Name of the env var holding the Bearer token

disabled.description: Set true to skip this server
